===================
===================
=== bd01231998.txt
===================
===================
===================
Bob Dylan and Band
1998-01-23
Boston MA
Fleet Center
lineage:  data vine cd copy flacs (files dated Jul 2004) > harddrive > upload
comments:  flacs decoded without error.
digging around for trade fodder and ran across this little gem which i had never listened to, so its about freaking time! a simple twist is sounding sweet as i type...
 no art or text came w/ the flacs.  this is probably LosslessBob LB-884
as its the only one there.
some hot guitar playing on Sweet Marie to start the set, sounding good through Cold Irons, looking forward to the acoustic songs...
thanks to the artists, tapers and sharers!
------------------------
copied this setlist from LB, 
(the number of tracks on each disks fits)
CD1 
1 Absolutely Sweet Marie, 
2 Lay, Lady, Lay, 
3 Cold Irons Bound, 
4 Simple Twist Of Fate, 
5 Silvio, 
6 Desolation Row (acoustic), 
7 One Too Many Mornings (acoustic), 
8 Tangled Up In Blue (acoustic), 
CD2 
1 Million Miles, 
2 Stuck Inside Of Mobile With The Memphis Blues Again, 
3 Ballad Of A Thin Man,
4 Highway 61 Revisited, 
5 Forever Young (acoustic), 
6 Love Sick, 
7 Rainy Day Women #12 & 35 
---------------------------------------
the following info from bjorner.com:
Concert # 944 of The Never-Ending Tour. Concert # 8 of the 1998 Winter Tour. 1998 concert # 8.
Concert # 91 with the 11th Never-Ending Tour Band: Bob Dylan (vocal & guitar), Bucky Baxter (pedal steel guitar & electric slide guitar), Larry Campbell (guitar), Tony Garnier (bass), David Kemper (drums & percussion).
68, 13 acoustic with the band. 
Note. Double bill with Van Morrison.
6 new songs (40%) compared to previous concert. 2 new songs for this tour.
Stereo audience recording, 100 minutes.
Session info updated 20 May 2000.
